entity.label: Bered
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the south of Palestine (Gen. 16:14), in the desert of Shur, near Lahai-roi.

nodes.label: Bered
nodes.description: A town in the south of Palestine (Gen. 16:14), in the desert of Shur, near Lahai-roi.

verses.text: Wherefore the well was called Beerlahairoi; behold, it is between Kadesh and Bered.
